text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you happen to know 
this drink's slogan?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That phrase really stuck with me 
as a child. Now I feel nostalgic 
whenever I have this drink.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe… Maybe I should get one more.
